title: Sith Wars (disambiguation)
content:
'''Sith Wars''' may refer to the following items:

==[[Canon]]==
*A [[Sith war (Old Republic)|'''Sith war''']] that occurred during the [[time]] of the [[Galactic Republic|Old Republic]].
*The '''[[Great Sith War]]''', a conflict that occurred long before the [[High Republic Era]].
*The '''[[Great Sith Wars]]''', a conflict that occurred during the [[Sith Wars]].
*The '''[[Resurgence of the Sith]]''', a conflict that occurred during the Sith Wars.
*The '''[[Sith Wars]]''', which involved the Republic, the [[Sith Empire]], and the [[Chiss Ascendancy]].
*The '''[[Jedi-Sith War]]''', the last confirmed war between the [[Jedi Order]]'s [[Army of Light]] and the [[Sith]]'s [[Brotherhood of Darkness]].
*The '''[[war against the Sith]]''' orchestrated by [[Lady]] [[Qi'ra]] of the [[Crimson Dawn]] crime syndicate during the [[Galactic Civil War]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The '''[[Old Sith Wars]]''' of [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]–[[3950 BBY]], which involved the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] such as [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]], [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic-Qel Droma]], [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]], [[Darth Malak]], [[Kreia|Darth Traya]], [[Darth Nihilus]], and [[Darth Sion]].
**The '''[[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]''', the first conflict in the Old Sith Wars between [[Sith Empire (Exar Kun)/Legends|Exar Kun's Sith Empire]], the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the Republic.
**The '''[[Jedi Civil War]]''', which involved the Republic and Jedi against [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire]].
**The '''[[Sith Civil War]]''' and '''[[Dark Wars]]''' which followed the Jedi Civil War.
*The [[Sith Wars/Legends|'''Sith Wars''']] of the [[Galactic Standard Calendar|3600s BBY]], a decades long period which involved the Republic, the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], and other factions such as the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]].
**The [[Great Galactic War|'''Great Galactic War''']], also known as the '''Republic–Sith War'''.
**The '''[[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]]''' of [[3653 BBY]]–[[3641 BBY]].
**The '''[[Galactic War]]''' which ranged from approximately [[3641 BBY]]–[[3636 BBY]].
**The '''[[Third Galactic War]]''' that started in [[3628 BBY]].
*The '''[[New Sith Wars]]''' ([[2000 BBY/Legends|2000 BBY]]–[[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]]), a millennia long period which involved the Republic, the Jedi and its [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]], the [[New Sith|New Sith Empire]] and later the [[Sith/Legends|Sith's]] [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]].
**The [[Sith civil war|'''Sith civil war''']] which occurred during the final century of the New Sith Wars.
*The '''[[Sith–Imperial War]]''' of [[127 ABY]]–[[130 ABY]], between the allied [[One Sith]] and [[Fel Empire]], and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] and the [[New Jedi Order]].

==Visions==
*'''[[Unidentified war (era of war)]]''', a war between the Jedi and the Sith during the [[era of war]].
*'''[[Unidentified Jedi–Sith war]]''', a war between the Jedi and the Sith

==[[In-universe|Out-Of-universe]]==
*'''''[[Star Wars: Sith Wars]]''''', a [[2013]] young readers book.
